headline: Open Bionics math-hygiene flag-only re-queue (5 cycles open). PER PIPELINE INSTRUCTION: do NOT propose score change. Composite 97.5 sustained at exemplary-band; published dimension means all 4.5 reconstruct to 87.5, yielding sustained reconstruction discrepancy of +10.0 — the largest in current robotics-labs cluster math-hygiene cluster. Recent positive evidence supports sustained exemplary-band placement: (1) September 2025 Medicare policy approving 3D-printed prosthetics for coverage materially expands accessibility reach of Hero Arm — directly EQU-positive; (2) Hero Pro and Hero RGD wireless/waterproof models launched expanding accessibility; (3) Mr. Beast partnership for amputee access April 2026 (per scan note); (4) UK manufacturing six-figure overseas-expansion funding. NO ADVERSE NEWS in 24h or longer window. Math-hygiene flag-only resolution attempt: this assessor recommends data-team prioritize this entity in next math-hygiene resolution sprint given 5-cycle persistence and largest cluster discrepancy. Recommend confirm at 97.5 with math-hygiene flag carried for data-team resolution.
key_evidence: September 2025 Medicare policy change: 3D-printed prosthetics approved for coverage; directly expands Hero Arm accessibility reach. Medicare typically sets benchmark for private insurer coverage.
70% of Hero Arm orders in US covered by insurance (Open Bionics published statistic).
Hero Pro and Hero RGD wireless/waterproof model launches expand accessibility scope.
Mr. Beast partnership (April 2026 per scan note) for amputee access — positive empathic-deployment signal.
UK manufacturing six-figure funding for overseas expansion (The Manufacturer reporting).
No adverse news in evidence-window scan.

evidence.source: Open Bionics — 3D Printed Bionic Arm Insurance Coverage
evidence.finding: September 2025 Medicare policy change approving 3D-printed prosthetics; 70% of US Hero Arm orders insurance-covered.

evidence.source: Open Bionics — Explore New 3D Printed Prosthetic Insurance Coverage Options
evidence.finding: Updated insurance-coverage landscape post-Medicare policy change.

evidence.source: Curbcuts — Open Bionics community partnership coverage
evidence.finding: April 2026 community-partnership coverage for amputee access.

evidence.source: The Manufacturer — Open Bionics six-figure overseas expansion funding
evidence.finding: UK manufacturing six-figure funding round for overseas expansion.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 4.5 confirmed. Sustained exemplary-band placement; harm-detection and amplification operative through user-community channels.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 4.5 confirmed. Sustained empathic-regard architecture for amputee community; community-partnership pattern (Mr. Beast).
scoring_rationale.ACT: 4.5 confirmed. Operational deployment with Medicare coverage expanding action capacity.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 4.5 confirmed. September 2025 Medicare policy change is materially EQU-positive; could support refinement upward (4.5 → 4.75) but per pipeline instruction, no score change proposed.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 4.5 confirmed. Six-figure overseas-expansion funding extends systemic accessibility reach.
scoring_rationale.INT: 4.5 confirmed. Sustained declared accessibility-mission consistent with operational pattern.

math_check.validator_check: Reconstruction yields 87.5 vs published 97.5. Discrepancy +10.0 — LARGEST math-hygiene flag in robotics-labs cluster, sustained 5 cycles. PER PIPELINE INSTRUCTION: math-hygiene flag-only re-queue, NO SCORE CHANGE proposed. Dimension means anchored to evidence; composite reconstruction is data-team task. If reconstructed composite (87.5) is canonical, entity remains exemplary-band (>=81). Math-hygiene resolution should be prioritized in next data-team sprint.

math_hygiene_flag.issue: Published composite 97.5 vs reconstructed 87.5 from dimension means. Discrepancy +10.0 points — largest in robotics-labs cluster, sustained 5 cycles open. Both values are exemplary-band (>=81) so band placement is unaffected.
math_hygiene_flag.action: Flag-only re-queue per pipeline instruction. Do NOT propose composite change. PRIORITIZE for next data-team math-hygiene resolution sprint given 5-cycle persistence and largest cluster discrepancy. Possibilities: (a) older scoring formula in use; (b) dimension-weighting scheme variant; (c) bonus/penalty term not visible in dimension means.
math_hygiene_flag.evidence_basis_for_dimensions: All eight dimension means at 4.5 are well-supported by evidence; September 2025 Medicare policy change could support EQU refinement upward but per pipeline instruction no score change proposed.
math_hygiene_flag.resolution_recommendation: Data-team to investigate composite-reconstruction formula vs dimension-mean-based reconstruction; resolve before next assessor cycle to avoid 6-cycle staleness.

negativeSignals: None identified in evidence window. Math-hygiene flag is data-quality concern, not evidence-based negative.
positiveSignals: September 2025 Medicare 3D-printed prosthetic coverage policy change; Hero Pro and Hero RGD model launches; Mr. Beast community partnership (April 2026); UK manufacturing six-figure overseas expansion; sustained exemplary-band placement; 70% US insurance coverage rate.
sector_context: Robotics Labs / accessibility/healthcare cluster. Open Bionics is the highest-ranked entity in robotics-labs index (rank 1, composite 97.5). Cross-reference: rank-1-position-supportive evidence pattern. Math-hygiene flag is highest priority for resolution given index-position prominence.
open_actions_resolved: Math-hygiene flag-only re-queue completed per pipeline instruction
open_actions_carried: Math-hygiene resolution: data-team prioritize for next sprint (5-cycle persistence, largest cluster discrepancy)
Watch: any Open Bionics-related harm or incident report
Watch: Mr. Beast partnership operationalization scale
Consider future-cycle: EQU refinement upward to 4.75 reflecting Medicare coverage expansion (deferred until math-hygiene resolved to avoid compound discrepancy)
